nodes.label: Workflow
nodes.summary:
## Workflow

The Python service imports `helper`, calls `Service.run`, and mirrors similar call/import shapes in Rust, Go, C, C++, and Fortran.

nodes.label: definition.module
nodes.summary:
module math_mod
use iso_fortran_env
contains
subroutine greet()
call print_hello()
end subroutine greet
function add(a,b) result(c)
integer :: a,b,c
c = a+b
end
